# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "functionName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "cosmosDBAccountName": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "name": "[parameters('functionName')]",
      "apiVersion": "2018-11-01",
      "location": "West US",
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', 'your_server_farm_name')]"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "extensions",
          "name": "ManagedIdentity",
          "apiVersion": "2018-11-01",
          "properties": {
            "identity": {
              "type": "SystemAssigned"
            }
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01",
      "location": "West US",
      "properties": {
        "accountType": "Standard_LRS"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "apiVersion": "2018-06-01",
      "location": "West US"
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), '/databases/your_database_name')]",
      "apiVersion": "2019-06-01-preview",
      "location": "West US"
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts",
      "name": "[parameters('cosmosDBAccountName')]",
      "apiVersion": "2018-12-31"
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "functionIdentityClientId": {
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionName')), '2018-11-01').identity.principalId]",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "storageAccountKey": {
      "value": "[listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2019-06-01').keys.primaryKey]",
      "type": "secureString"
    }
  }
}
